ddls:
CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_code" TEXT /* Code of the course (e.g., CSCE 155A) */,
  "course_title" TEXT /* Title of the course */,
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the topic associated with the course */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the course materials or resources */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the course */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the course is offered */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor who teaches the course */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department offering the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the course was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the course information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic (e.g., Java, Python) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the topic */,
  "parent_topic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent topic (for hierarchical topics) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the topic was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the topic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_topics_parent_topic_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_topic_id") REFERENCES topics ("topic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the author is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the author was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the author information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the instructor belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the instructor was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the instructor information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_instructors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the department was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the department information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course to which the resource belongs */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., textbook, lecture notes, video) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the resource */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the resource */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the resource */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the resource information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teaching assistant, instructor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_statistics" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource that was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the resource */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the resource was accessed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the resource usage (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
